caption: A man with white hair and a beard, wearing glasses, a light-colored long-sleeved shirt, and a white sleeveless vest, stands behind a brown wooden podium. He is positioned in front of a textured green wall with geometric patterns and a tall, cylindrical decorative column featuring red flowers. Two microphones are attached to the podium and directed toward him. He is speaking and gesturing with his right hand raised, palm facing forward with fingers slightly spread. Across the sequence of frames, his expression and the position of his raised hand shift slightly as he continues his address, but his overall posture and the background remain constant. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in the scene.
